curation.synopsis: The Thramas Crusade has dragged on through a hundred void-engagements and the Night Lords are bleeding men they cannot replace. Their primarch Konrad Curze lies in a coma after the Lion mauled him in single combat, and the Legion's senior officers — the Kyroptera — gather aboard the Nightfall to settle what comes next. First Captain Sevatar, the self-styled Prince of Crows, has already made his decision: shatter the Legion into six independent companies, slip the Dark Angels' grasp, and run for Terra. As he argues his case, Curze's memories bleed into his head — the lifepod's crash on Nostramo, the murder of the city he ruled, the moment the Emperor lifted him out of the gutter. Sevatar must hold his brothers together long enough to outwit the Lion and reckon with the kind of monster his father chose him to be.
